description_long: This modern house features a multi-level design with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a mix of geometric forms. The exterior combines light-colored walls with sections of wood paneling and metal accents, creating a sleek and contemporary appearance. A rooftop terrace with greenery and a flag is visible, along with a spacious deck area and a cylindrical structure that appears to be a water tank or silo. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes landscaped elements such as trees and shrubs. The house has multiple entry points, including a main entrance with steps and a garage. The overall layout emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a rooftop terrace, surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, rooftop terrace with flag, and a tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical water tank, secondary entrance, and the deck area with adjacent landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back deck, additional windows, and the integration of the house with the surrounding fence and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the rooftop terrace, water tank, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, a simple modern door, and minimal overhang, integrated into the facade with clean lines.
